message:
fix(ci): correct test runner invocation and simplify test glob

ci.yml:
  Change `bun test --coverage` to `bun run test -- --coverage` so the
  coverage flag passes through the package.json test script correctly.
  Without `bun run`, the `--coverage` flag was being consumed by bun's
  own CLI rather than forwarded to the test runner.

package.json:
  Simplify the test script glob from explicit directory listing
  (`apps packages tests/contract tests/integration`) to `.test.ts`
  pattern matching, which automatically discovers all test files
  regardless of directory structure.

Issue tracker (.beads/issues.jsonl):
  Sync issue status updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Run unit tests with coverage
-        run: bun test --coverage 2>&1 | tee coverage-output.txt
+        run: bun run test -- --coverage 2>&1 | tee coverage-output.txt
         env:
           VITE_DISABLE_COMPILER: ${{ matrix.compiler == 'disabled' && 'true' || '' }}

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
     "dev:gateway": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway dev",
     "dev:web": "bun run --filter @flywheel/web dev",
     "build": "bun run --filter '*' build",
-    "test": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test apps packages tests/contract tests/integration",
+    "test": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test .test.ts",
     "test:integration": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test tests/integration",
     "test:e2e": "bunx playwright test",
     "e2e:server": "bun scripts/e2e-server.ts",
